projects.name: Personal Website
projects.tech: React / Vite / Tailwind CSS / Gemini API
bullets: Built and deployed a personal portfolio site at **kiiimfu.me** using **React**, **Vite**, and **Tailwind CSS**, hosted on Vercel.
Integrated an AI chatbot powered by **Gemini API** directly in the browser — no backend required.

projects.name: Survey-Based ML Random Forest Prediction Model
bullets: Trained a Random Forest model based on **825 survey responses** with mixed numeric and text features.
Optimized **7 hyperparameters** using Optuna. Achieved **70.24%** test accuracy.

projects.name: Calendar Sharing Web App (FamCalendar)
bullets: Developed a web-based Progressive Web App (**PWA**) enabling real-time calendar sharing across users.
Integrated open-source **pyicloud** to securely access and sync events from users' iCloud accounts.

projects.name: Neurological Patient Care System
bullets: Trained a **MLP model** to achieve **90%+** accuracy (with 11.5k set of EEG data from Kaggle) in predicting possibilities of future neurological disorder.
Built a database based on **PostgreSQL** that stores data of healthcare providers and patients.

projects.name: Mystery Liquid Crime Scene Simulation
bullets: Built a Ren'Py-based visual novel simulating game, featuring branching logic, decision trees, and a custom UI.

projects.name: Gear Up (G1 Driving Test Preparation App)
bullets: Built two user cases (study/test mode) based on **SOLID principle**; also built two GUI respectively.
